cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 收取體制
cover.subtitle:
토지엔 전세, 집엔 공납,
사람엔 역의 시대.
cover.imagePrompt: Joseon folk minhwa + genre-painting tones. Hanji beige, ink-black, crimson, navy. Early Joseon scene: a low official in dark dopo and gat receiving sacks of rice and bolts of cloth from kneeling peasants in front of a thatched village granary. Wooden measuring scoop and ledger book on a low table. Behind: rice paddies and a small Korean tile-roof magistrate's office. Composition: orderly, hierarchical, slightly somber. Color: hanji beige + ink-black + deep crimson sash accent. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 방납·방군수포 폐단 확산, 농민 부담 가중.

outro.tip_headline:
"전세는 토지, 공납은 호, 역은 사람"
부과 기준을 묶을 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 전세=토지, 공납=호(가호), 역=인정(사람)을 구분해야 한다. 전분6등·연분9등은 세종, 직전법은 세조의 트레이드마크.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: three stylized Korean traditional icons in a row — a small rice paddy plot, a clay jar (gongnap tribute item), and a silhouette of a peasant carrying a load. Soft separators between them. Cream #F2EDE3 base + crimson #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
